item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-020","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer separates the user's growth target from the local advantage of more refined manual editing, repeatedly frames refinement as useful only if it improves completion/follow/conversion metrics, and identifies output frequency/iteration speed as the main bottleneck. It gives a clear hybrid strategy and test window rather than merely saying quality matters."}
